stories.headline: Senior Iranian IRGC official assassinated in targeted strike in Tehran

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: From Iran, right now. A senior IRGC official has been assassinated. Not sure if it was Israel or us.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: A targeted assassination of an IRGC member just took place in Andisheh, Tehran, the first in Iran since the April ceasefire began.

stories.headline: Violent clashes and riots erupt in France after PSG Champions League win

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Will Paris survive this? Bearing in mind Paris survived the World War II Nazi occupation. I would say pray for Paris, and then I remember the politicians allowed this. Like Walz and Newsom do here.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇫🇷PSG Champion d’Europe ! Victoire Historique… mais la France se ridiculise encore avec la violence Le PSG remporte enfin la Coupe d’Europe ! Une soirée historique pour le club parisien et pour le football français… Mais comme trop souvent en France, la victoire a été gâchée par des scènes de violence, de destructions et d’affrontements inutiles.

stories.headline: Jeff Bezos criticizes excessive corporate welfare and political influence from business.
stories.body: Jeff Bezos: "We have way too much corporate welfare, way too much corporate subsidies. There's way too much influence in politics from business, in some cases, wealthy people who really focus on that, unions."

stories.headline: Chef shares shrimp spring roll recipe with ingredients and peanut sauce.
stories.body:
One of my most requested recipes - Shrimp Spring Roll 🍤 Screenshot and Save to try this recipe for yourself!

My Viral Recipe:
Rice Paper Wraps
Romaine lettuce leaves
Vermicelli Noodles
Cooked Shrimp
Carrot Matchsticks
Cucumbers matchsticks
Basil

Peanut Sauce:
1/4 Cup Peanut Butter
2 TB Coconut Milk
1 TSP Garlic Minced
2 TB Tamari
2 TB Rice Wine Vinegar
2 TB maple syrup
2 TSP chili paste

stories.headline: MiniMax releases M3 model with 1M context, multimodal and agentic coding at 1/20th compute cost.
stories.body:
The new MiniMax-M3 is their first model to have 1m context, multimodal, and agentic coding capability. 

Congratulations to @MiniMax_AI for the breakthrough in sparse-attention architecture cutting compute & cost to 1/20th their previous generation.

Free to try in Cline now!

stories.headline: Boebert mentions stargates and portals in secret UFO files
stories.body:
Representative Lauren Boebert just said that there are a lot of mentions of Stargates and Portals in the Secret UFO Files that only Congress can see right now.

She then asks if there’s Breeding between Humans and these Alien Creatures because of all of the Interdimensional Traveling between Realms and other parts of the World.

We do know that there has been Forced Breeding Program forcing Criminals to breed with Aliens at certain Facilities in Mexico and potentially other Places and in the World right now.

This is all a repeat of the Titan Gods and their Nephilim Offspring mating with Mortals that we saw in the Book Of Enoch, the Book Of Genesis, the Book Of Jubilees, and the Book Of Giants before the Great Flood where the Greeks erroneously called that Aeon “The Golden Age”.

This only gets darker as more and more Declassification happens and they seriously need to declassify these Secret Documents that Congress keeps being allowed to see but not the Public.

That’s where all of the really crazy stuff is.

What do you guys think?

Should they just release everything and allow the Public to see all of the Information and stop hiding it from us?
